name: Booking Holdings Inc.
description: Booking Holdings Inc. is a world leader in online travel and related services, provided to consumers and local partners in more than 220 countries and territories through six primary consumer-facing brands: Booking.com, Priceline, Agoda, Rentalcars.com, KAYAK, and OpenTable. The company's mission is to make it easier for everyone to experience the world by offering a comprehensive platform for booking accommodations, flights, rental cars, and restaurant reservations.
